locations.name: 科科群岛
locations.summary: 科科群岛（緬甸語：ကိုကိုးကျွန်း；英語：Coco Islands），是缅甸南部一群岛，西为孟加拉湾，东为安达曼海，南隔科科海峡与印度安達曼-尼科巴群島聯邦屬地相望。科科群岛位于安达曼群岛的最北端，战略位置极其重要。该群岛由大、…

locations.name: 缅甸
locations.summary: 緬甸聯邦共和國（緬甸語：ပြည်ထောင်စု သမ္မတ မြန်မာနိုင်ငံတော်，羅馬化：Pranyhtaungcu. Sa.ma.ta.

relations.subject: Andaman coucal
relations.evidence: The Andaman coucal or brown coucal (Centropus andamanensis) is a species of non-parasitic cuckoo found in the Andamans, Coco and Table Islands

relations.subject: Andaman coucal
relations.evidence: It is mainly found in the Andamans (at least South, North and associated islets) as well as on the nearby Coco Islands and Table Island, which belong to Myanmar
